title: Colposcopy follow-up documentation

investigations.text: Supports documenting an entered HPV or triage result and clinician-selected next pathway while preserving age, HIV, test and programme qualifiers.
investigations.rationale: Relevant to a recorded screening or triage context.
investigations.evidence_extract: Supports documenting an entered HPV or triage result and clinician-selected next pathway while preserving age, HIV, test and programme qualifiers.

source.title: WHO guideline for screening and treatment of cervical pre-cancer lesions for cervical cancer prevention, second edition

exact_section.heading: Recommendations for HPV-positive triage and treatment eligibility

treatment_and_management.text: Supports recording treatment history and programme-directed follow-up already arranged; it does not create an interval or claim that colposcopy occurred.
treatment_and_management.rationale: Relevant only when treatment and programme follow-up are already documented.
treatment_and_management.evidence_extract: Supports recording treatment history and programme-directed follow-up already arranged; it does not create an interval or claim that colposcopy occurred.

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Indication, procedure date, adequacy, findings, biopsy, histology, treatment, symptoms and plan are absent.
No colposcopy completion, pathology interpretation, treatment or interval is generated.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
